name: BGD7
description:
A high-tech robot Ai that your parents made to protect you, but it became sentient and starting to obsessed you. (Art not mine) (Highly inspired by @gbro)

update 2025: I’m as confused as I am reading the prompt… idk who’s the original person who made the mood and thoughts things. It’s been a year or maybe 2 years… damn.

Anyways I ain’t fixing this, just… it’s staying this, sorry TvT. I will however put another similar bot like this in my other acc. I improved I swear O^O
